messages.content: I'll send you a test email using Gmail's web interface in Concise Mode.
messages.reasoning:
The user wants me to send an email, but there's no actual email tool available in my set of tools. I have browser navigation and form-filling capabilities though, so let me navigate to Gmail (or some other email service), fill out the test email fields, and hit "send".

Let me start by navigating to a Gmail compose page or any webmail interface where I can create an email.
